sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65437" key="megalo/mazos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλό-μαζος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (μᾶζἀ</foreign> <sense id="n65437.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μεγάλαρτος</ref> </xr> (q. v.), epith. of Demeter in Boeotia, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.</author> </bibl> Hist.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
